title: Rocks Comes to Elbaf
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Unknown person #4, Sanji, Unknown person #5, Nami, Unknown person #6 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today's the day we finally win her from you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We're taking your first mate, Shakuyaku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please accept it as a gift!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No! Shakuyaku, take my flower instead! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Birds lost their songs, and people turned against one another.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You never learn, Roger!! Isn't being loved...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just hearing you say my name is_()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How dare you do that to Gyaban?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who did you come to take again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn it! I like Shakuyaku too much!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her beauty humbled even the mightiest of warriors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can take my soul while you're at it!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Roger!! You know I'm the one who likes you, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OUT TA THE WAY, GLORIONA!! YOU'RE BLOCKING SHAKY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rayleigh, it must be so hard for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We've spotted the Roger and KUja crews!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get moving with the loot! Don't leave a single crumb behind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HEY!! At least let us keep some of the food!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hurry it up!! We've gotta set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PIRATE GOL D. ROGER (future king of the pirates and father of age)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: (future King of the Pirates and father of Ace)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: VICE ADMIRAL MONKEY D. GARP future hero of the Marines and grandfather-be-hikes

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 56 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
